response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned staff-level engineer with a broad technical background and recent, highly relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP at Naver. However, he does not meet the core requirement of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions; his deep experience is in general software engineering, and his explicit GenAI work appears to be very recent. While he demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals and an ability to work across diverse stacks, the significant gap in long-term, dedicated AI experience makes him a borderline fit for a role focused on leading GenAI delivery.
strengths: Recent staff-level experience at Naver is directly relevant to agentic workflows and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Demonstrates staff-level seniority and a broad skill set across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, Java) and platforms (AWS).
Strong software craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD) and experience with high-volume data systems and microservices.
concerns: Lacks the required minimum of 8 years of experience specifically in building and shipping production-grade AI solutions.
No explicit mention of experience with core GenAI concepts like Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) or vector databases.
Experience is heavily weighted towards general web development and systems programming, with GenAI expertise appearing very recent.
